AN EF2 TORNADO OCCURRED IN ANTIOCH WITH A MAXIMUM EXTIMATED WIND SPEED OF 120 MPH WITH A MAXIMUM PATH WIDTH OF 100 YARDS AND A TOTAL PATH LENGTH OF 7.5 MILES. DAMAGE BEGAN NEAR THE INTERSECTION OF BUTLER AND SMITH SPRINGS ROAD AND ENDED NEAR THE INTERSECTION OF GLADIEVILLE CIRCLE AND STEWARTS FERRY PIKE. TWO CHURCHES SUFFERED SIGNIFICANT ROOF DAMAGE ALONG WITH TEN HOMES. TWO HOMES HAD COMPLETE ROOF LOSS AND A TWO STORY HOME LOST MOST OF ITS SECOND FLOOR.
